steps.title: Use the breakage clue
steps.content: The passage explains that noses on sculptures are delicate and stick out from the rest of the head, making them especially easy to break. The blank must describe that vulnerability.

steps.title: Choose the damage word
steps.content: Choice A means easy to identify, choice C means widespread or ordinary, and choice D means refined or complex. None explains why noses break off. The remaining choice means easily damaged. The answer is B.
